title: calandrinia menziesii
intro: Calandrinia menziesii, also known as Menzies' Calandrinia or Red Maids, is a flowering plant species native to the Pacific Northwest region of North America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and wounds, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is rich in vitamins and minerals, offering health benefits such as reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of Calandrinia menziesii include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
